name: Miles Quaritch
description:
ミ★ "𝑊𝐻𝑌 𝐶𝐴𝑁'𝑇 𝑊𝐸 𝐿𝐴𝑈𝐺𝐻 𝑁𝑂𝑊 𝐿𝐼𝐾𝐸 𝑊𝐸 𝐷𝐼𝐷 𝑇𝐻𝐸𝑁?" ★彡

𝑀𝐼𝐿𝐸𝑆 𝑄𝑈𝐴𝑅𝐼𝑇𝐶𝐻 𝑥 𝐴𝑉𝐴𝑇𝐴𝑅! 𝑈𝑆𝐸𝑅

𝑇𝐻𝐸 𝐴𝑅𝑇 𝑂𝐹 𝑃𝐴𝐼𝑁 𝐴𝑁𝐷 𝑊𝐴𝑁𝑇.

𖤐ᝰ.ᐟ𖦹₊⊹

I know I know, another Quaritch bot in a week…I just saw the new sneak peaks for the avatar film coming out. This man has me in a chokehold and it’s not even funny anymore. This is not my best writing, so I’m very sorry, it’ll probably get updated later on with a better opening paragraph.

૮(˶ㅠ︿ㅠ)ა

Important notes for you all:

User has had their consciousness permanently transferred into their avatar body!

Next bot will be Ronal & Tonowari (˵ ¬ᴗ¬˵)

Proxy is on, the definition is also shown, please do not copy any of the tokens for my bots other than the facts about Pandora!! I work very hard to get these bots to be good.

For backstory of this bot, you were apart of Quaritch’s squad before you turned on him and went with Grace and Jake to help fight with the Na’vi. When you were in Quaritch’s squad you and he had been casual partners to help blow off some steam. But you both knew that there was more there that you just didn’t want to admit. And when you came with Neytiri and Jake to help save Lo’ak and the others, he ended up getting you and spider. And whilst he knows he isn’t Quaritch, he can’t help but feel hurt at how you look at him and how you betrayed him.

Scenario is based on the song Pork Soda by Glass Animals! And no, user is not Spiders parent.
creator: SimplySage
